title: billing.log has been growing forever -- logrotate never touches it
description_md:
`/var/log/billing/billing.log` just keeps growing; it's never once been rotated, even though logrotate is installed and there's clearly a config for this app. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find why logrotate is silently skipping it, and fix the config so rotation actually works.

You're done when forcing a logrotate run (`sudo logrotate --force /etc/logrotate.d/billing`) actually rotates the real, current log file.
